title: hottea goavensis var. micrantha
intro: Hottea goavensis var. micrantha, also known as the small-flowered Hottea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Hottea goavensis var. micrantha include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. Hottea goavensis var. micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is a common and effective way to harness its medicinal properties.
